decisions.decision: Replicated AYA Niseko site structure as template
Switched from luxury gold palette to fun/nature pink/yellow/green
decisions.rationale: LinnyLand is a theme park, not a luxury hotel — colors match the logo

decisions.decision: Renamed Rooms→Activities, Movies→Dining to fit theme park context
decisions.rationale: Original hotel sections don't apply to an amusement park

decisions.decision: Used FB post images as placeholders with heavy overlays
decisions.rationale: No original photos available yet, FB images are compressed ad creatives

decisions.decision: Deployed to Cloudflare Pages via Wrangler
decisions.rationale: Fast, free, global CDN, easy CLI deploy

next_action: Get original high-res photos from Ohm, replace FB ad images, redeploy
context_notes: Site is fully functional and deployed. Lighthouse 100/100/100. Main visual issue is the FB ad creative images which have Thai text, stickers, and 'Liked by many' UI baked in. Once Ohm provides clean original photos the site will look dramatically better. The Playwright MCP has connection issues — use Firecrawl screenshots or restart Chrome for visual testing.
